channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham dies after sudden illness | Special Report
item.description: U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham has died following a brief illness, his office confirmed. Carissa Lawson anchored this CBS News special report.

item.title: "48 Hours" show schedule
item.description: True crime. Real justice. Missing it would be a crime.

item.title: Iran live updates: Gulf countries under attack after US retaliatory strikes
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, involving joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: WATCH: Simple bike ride leads to extraordinary act of kindness
item.description: A 14-year-old cyclist became a neighborhood hero after spotting a disoriented woman in the Arizona heat. His quick call to...
